register.title: Create account
register.subtitle: Start with an authenticated Inertia workspace.

forgot.title: Forgot password
forgot.subtitle: Send a new generated password using the core mail flow.

reset.title: Reset password
reset.subtitle: Set a new password with a valid reset token.

verify.title: Verify email
verify.description: Email verification is powered by the core notification flow. Send a fresh verification message when the current user still needs to verify their address.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Manage your account details and password.

profile.title: Profile
profile.subtitle: Update your account details and language preference.

password.title: Password
password.subtitle: Pick a strong password and keep your account secure.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Overview of current inventory health and recent activity.
dashboard.settings_description: The app is using the reference database-token cookie guard.

recent.title: Recent Stock Movements
recent.subtitle: The last 10 movements across the system.

items.title: Inventory
items.subtitle: Manage your product catalog and stock levels.
items.subtitle_create: Create a new inventory item. You can set quantities later via a stock movement.
items.subtitle_edit: Update item details. Quantity is not editable here — create a stock movement instead.
items.confirm_delete: Are you sure you want to delete this item?
items.quantity_help: Quantity cannot be edited here. Use a stock movement to change inventory.

empty.title: No items yet
empty.description: Create your first inventory item to get started.

movements_empty.title: No movements yet
movements_empty.description: This item has no movement history. Create an incoming or adjustment movement to record stock.

items.movement_history_subtitle: Every stock movement that includes this item.
items.store_quantities_subtitle: Current quantity of this item at each store.
items.no_store_stock: No stock recorded at any store yet.

stores.title: Stores
stores.subtitle: Manage your stores and track what they received.
stores.subtitle_create: Create a new store or branch.
stores.items_received_subtitle: Items received by this store across all incoming movements.
stores.inventory_subtitle: Items currently stocked at this store.
stores.inventory_empty: No items in stock at this store.

empty.title: No stores yet
empty.description: Stores will appear here once they are created.

items_empty.title: No items received
items_empty.description: This store has not received any items yet.

movements_empty.title: No movements yet
movements_empty.description: There are no stock movements linked to this store.

errors.warehouse_unique: You already have a warehouse store.
errors.has_history: Cannot delete a store that has inventory or stock movement history.

stores.confirm_delete: Are you sure you want to delete this store?

stock_movements.title: Stock Movements
stock_movements.subtitle: Record every stock change as an immutable audit document.
stock_movements.subtitle_create: Choose source and destination; the movement type is inferred automatically.
stock_movements.subtitle_adjustment: Set the new quantity and reason for each item at a store.

empty.title: No movements yet
empty.description: Create your first stock movement to start tracking inventory.

errors.out_of_stock: Quantity exceeds current stock. Reduce the quantity or create an adjustment movement first.
errors.missing_store: Cannot delete this movement because the destination store no longer exists.
errors.missing_source_store: Cannot delete this movement because the source store no longer exists.
errors.missing_store_item: Cannot delete this movement because the inventory row for ":title" at ":store" is missing.
errors.would_be_negative: Cannot delete this movement because it would make ":title" negative at ":store".

stock_movements.confirm_delete: Are you sure you want to delete this stock movement?

reports.title: Reports
reports.subtitle: Quick overview of inventory health and movement trends.
reports.store_consumption_subtitle: Total outgoing quantity and value per store for the current month.
reports.most_moved_subtitle: Items with the highest cumulative movement across all types.
reports.adjustments_by_reason_subtitle: How many adjustment rows have been recorded per reason.
